pHRemarks: soilInCaClpH when aliquot of 20 mL CaCl2 was added was 5.14. That aliquot likely may have been DI water instead of CaCl2. Therefore 40 mL of CaCl2 was added and stirred and settled. That resulted in a pH more consistent with other soil samples. There is not a sufficient amount of soil in the remaining core to remeasure pH.
